title: Oxygen Concentrator Malfunction — Acceptable Handling
scenario: Customer reports a malfunctioning concentrator. Agent resolves it eventually but without warmth or urgency.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: My oxygen machine is making a beeping noise and I don't know what's wrong.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: What's the error code on the display?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's a filter issue. The unit will need to be replaced.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We can get one out tomorrow. Do you have a backup tank to use tonight?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Yes, I have one from the hospital.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, use that until tomorrow. The driver will bring a new concentrator and take the old one.
